NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED; DEFENDANT NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT WAS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. IF DEFENDANT SUBMITS A FILED VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WITH A PROPOSED ORDER, THEN THE DEMURRER WILL BE SUSTAINED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. [AFTER HEARING, DEFENDANT SUBMITTED A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE AND THE COURT SUSTAINED DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. (301)] JUDGE JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to show cause to plaintiff in propria persona for failure to appear at the pre-arbitration settlement conference on Aug. 21, 2006 is heard this day. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time. There being no appearance by defendant's counsel, defendant's request for sanctions is denied. Proceedings reported by: Christina Paxton, CSR# 1558 (212)

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $400, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bivett Alex Brackett-Thompson, 756-9942, Plaintiff in propria person and Opposing Party
Jeffrey A. Skinner, Esq., of Law Offices of Skinner & Hagopian, LLP, 391-4200, for Defendant and Moving Party
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT WAS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. IF DEFENDANT CAN SUBMIT A FILED VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WITH A PROPOSED ORDER, THEN DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER WILL BE SUSTAINED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. (301/JLW/ju-ck) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

[AFTER HEARING, DEFENDANT NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS SUBMITTED A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE TO THE COURT. THE COURT SUSTAINED DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. (301)]

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Plaintiff in Propria Persona arrived late. Sanctions previously imposed are vacated. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR# 2031. (212)
